description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a high fence and lush landscaping including palm trees and tall hedges. The exterior walls are primarily white, with black and gray accents on the railings, window frames, and gates. The house features multiple balconies and terraces, with outdoor seating areas and potted plants visible on the upper level. A prominent staircase runs along the side of the building, providing access to the upper floor and rooftop terrace. The front yard is paved with gray tiles, offering ample parking or gathering space, while the backyard is more private and enclosed by greenery. Large windows and glass doors allow for plenty of natural light, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, black railings, and extensive outdoor terraces, surrounded by high fences and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, upper terrace, and lush landscaping with palm trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long exterior staircase, multiple doors, and a large paved area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard, tall hedges, and a secondary entrance with a small terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper terrace, more greenery, and the continuation of the high fence and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, steps leading up, and a paved approach, flanked by high fencing and minimal decorative elements.
